summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AI-powered personal finance management app. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend UI working with minor AI modal timeout issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal shows loading state but doesn't display AI insights after completion
ui_bugs.details: AI analysis completes successfully via API (17 seconds) but frontend modal doesn't update to show results. Likely async handling issue in React component.

passed_tests: User registration flow - creates new account successfully
User login flow with admin credentials - works correctly
Dashboard loads with summary cards (income, expenses, balance)
Add income transaction - successfully creates and displays
Add expense transaction - successfully creates and displays
Transaction list displays all added transactions
Bar chart shows monthly trends correctly
Pie chart shows expense breakdown by category
AI analysis backend API - returns comprehensive insights and raw reasoning
User logout functionality - redirects to login page
Authentication flow - JWT cookies, session management
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix AI insights modal timeout issue - the backend AI analysis works perfectly (17 seconds response time with comprehensive insights), but the frontend modal doesn't update to show the results. Need to improve async handling in AIInsightsModal component to properly wait for and display the AI response.
